case_title: RJM ACQUISITIONS LLC VS. PATRIA VASQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RJM ACQUISITIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, PATRIA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009
